command:
set -euo pipefail
rm -f arch/arm64/boot/dts/allwinner/sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb
rm -f arch/arm64/boot/dts/allwinner/.sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb.*
if [ ! -f .config ]; then
  make ARCH=arm64 defconfig
fi
make ARCH=arm64 CROSS_COMPILE=aarch64-linux-gnu- CHECK_DTBS=y allwinner/sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb
command_display:
bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail
rm -f arch/arm64/boot/dts/allwinner/sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb
rm -f arch/arm64/boot/dts/allwinner/.sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb.*
if [ ! -f .config ]; then
  make ARCH=arm64 defconfig
fi
make ARCH=arm64 CROSS_COMPILE=aarch64-linux-gnu- CHECK_DTBS=y allwinner/sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dtb
'
